title: machines.txt + package exposure
manager: `machines.txt` (an RFC, like robots.txt but for discoverable machines) plus package.json exposure — the conventions that make a site or package advertise the FSL machines it contains, so crawlers, agents, and tools can find them. This is discoverability plumbing: it is how a machine published anywhere becomes findable by the AI systems and tooling that would want to consume it, instead of sitting invisible in a repo.
cs: machines.txt RFC (#778) + package.json exposure (#610); discoverability conventions; fsl-twins jssm#778/#610.
